job.brief: Clean the customer signup CSV. Return CSV text only with columns name,email,signup_date,plan in that exact order. Trim names, lowercase emails and plan values, keep plans only when they are free, pro, or enterprise, and drop rows with blank required cells.

inputs.csv:
full_name,email,signup_date,plan
 Katherine Johnson ,KATHERINE@EXAMPLE.COM,2026-01-07,FREE 
 Ada Lovelace ,ADA@EXAMPLE.COM,2026-01-04, Pro
Barbara Liskov,BARBARA@EXAMPLE.COM,2026-01-08,pro
Bad Date,bad-date@example.com,,pro
Missing Email,,2026-01-06,free
Casey Semicolon,CASEY@EXAMPLE.COM,2026-03-03,FREE
Grace Hopper,grace@example.com,2026-01-05,enterprise
Invalid Plan,invalid@example.com,2026-01-09,trial
